blocks.text: Barcelona's title charge hits San Mamés — Athletic's fortress awaits
Real Madrid won at Celta on Friday. Barcelona cannot afford to slip at San Mamés — Athletic just knocked out Real Sociedad in the Copa. The title race has no room for a quiet night.
🚴 Strade Bianche 12:00 — Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard on Tuscany's iconic gravel roads
